title: lettsomia collinsiae
intro: Lettsomia collinsiae, also known as Collins' Lettsomia, is a rare flowering plant endemic to Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lettsomia collinsiae include potential uses in wound healing, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine.
